items: When building file-handling chat apps, always check for uploaded files in messages and explicitly read/process them before passing to LLM context
Enable file_upload UI feature explicitly via update_app_features when the app needs to accept file uploads
Store uploaded file data in session dictionaries and reference them in handle_chat using session IDs from messages
Inject Excel/file data into system prompts to provide context for LLM analysis rather than relying on raw file references
Use incremental file reading for large files to handle size constraints in read tool
When debugging file upload issues, verify handle_chat actually reads file data from messages and sessions, not just forwards them
